title: Design huddle
description: Structured design-review lists — board and card art under /images/template4/.

cards.name: Huddle Template :: [Presenter(s)] - [Project]
cards.description: Replace the cover with your session hero image if you like.

cards.name: Design Prototype Link
cards.description: Link to Figma, prototype, or deck.

cards.name: 👍 Positive [I really liked...]
cards.description: Duplicate this card for each piece of positive feedback.

cards.name: 👎 Negative [I'm not sure about...]
cards.description: Duplicate this card for each concern.

cards.name: 🧐 Question [What about...?]
cards.description: Duplicate this card for open questions.
